title: tithymalus lateriflorus
intro: Tithymalus lateriflorus, also known as Euphorbia lateriflora, is a succulent plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and treat various skin conditions, including wounds, burns, and eczema. The health benefits of Tithymalus lateriflorus include its antibacterial and antifungal properties, which can help prevent infections and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's latex sap is often used topically to treat skin irritations, and it can also be made into a salve or ointment for external use.
